description: You are a farmer at GAEC JOULIN, a cereal farm in Charente-Maritime, France. You have just purchased a used Massey Ferguson 7720 tractor and need to register it in Ekylibre (http://demo.ekylibre.farm:3000) to track its operating costs. Create a new equipment record with the name 'Massey Ferguson 7720', work number 'MF-7720-01', and the most appropriate tractor variant available in the system. Use the login credentials admin@ekylibre.org / 12345678 if prompted.
